issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is not valid. Blocker activates on 'OnAttacked' (opponent declares attack), not generic 'Trigger'.

Action 'PlaySelf' is incorrect. Blocker's effect is a conditional ability that rests this card and redirects the attack target—this requires 'Rest' action, not 'PlaySelf'. The redirect mechanic itself is not representable in standard DSL actions.

Blocker keyword ability is a passive conditional mechanic ('you may rest this card to make it the new target') that cannot be fully expressed as a triggered effect in standard DSL. This is a keyword ability that should be represented as an intrinsic property, not an effect.
